testcase.name: goToMainPage

error.message:
element click intercepted: Element ... is not clickable at point (1696, 23). Other element would receive the click:
...
(Session info: chrome=149.0.7827.53) Build info: version: '4.23.0', revision: '4df0a231af' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'x86_64', os.version: '26.3.1', java.version: '21.0.8' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [d3e8811bfd4aa79133f8925d4203efdb, clickElement {id=f.ADD8A08C9E96C67BFF87A54ACA92F9B1.d.48BD3C2072EC75E7E9812AFD7F170030.e.147}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 149.0.7827.53, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 149.0.7827.54 (42ce21f112d0..., userDataDir: /var/folders/sl/15v965y142g...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:55219}, goog:processID: 19525, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: mac, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:55219/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 149.0.7827.53, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Element: [[ChromeDriver: chrome on mac (d3e8811bfd4aa79133f8925d4203efdb)] -> id: rooms-header-create-bubble-button] Session ID: d3e8811bfd4aa79133f8925d4203efdb
